Just had a popup on my phone.

Semiwiki request access to other apps on my phone , is that correct?

 

Daniel Nenni
Founder
Staff member

Barnsley said:

Just had a popup on my phone.

Semiwiki request access to other apps on my phone , is that correct?

Click to expand...

No.
